name: Sarah Executive
title: Chief Product Officer
about: A strategic leader bridging the gap between design, engineering, and business. I build high-performing teams that construct sustainable, billion-dollar product ecosystems.

experience.description: Scaled enterprise ARR by 300% and spearheaded the acquisition of two competitor platforms.
Managed a global team of 150 PMs and Engineers across 4 continents.

projects.title: Project Olympus
projects.description: Launched the company's flagship AI product, reaching $50M ARR in year one.

projects.title: Global Restructuring
projects.description: Redesigned the entire product org structure to reduce time-to-market by 40%.
